creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
you are misunderstanding the purpose of @dir in pkg-plist.  Most if not all of those lines should be removed.  Please review /usr/ports/CHANGES for more information about the point of this keyword (it is not a new name for @dirrm and @dirrmtry)

Also, if *at all* possible, please provide poudriere testport logs as attachments.

The process of testing your port may flush out other issues.  Don't forget to run ports-mgmt/portlint on the port either.
